mapper.sql: id, name, contacts, phone_num, address, bank_name, account_number, remark, enabled, sort, delete_flag
mapper.insert: insert into jsh_freight_carrier (id, name, contacts, phone_num, address, bank_name, account_number, remark, enabled, sort, delete_flag) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{contacts,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{phoneNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{address,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{bankName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{accountNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enabled,jdbcType=BIT}, #{sort,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{deleteFlag,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

update jsh_freight_carrier
name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
contacts = #{contacts,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
phone_num = #{phoneNum,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
address = #{address,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
bank_name = #{bankName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
account_number = #{accountNumber,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
remark = #{remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
enabled = #{enabled,jdbcType=BIT},
sort = #{sort,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
delete_flag = #{deleteFlag,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
